name: @platform/notification-runtime
description: Notification service abstraction: push, in-app, and browser notification channel interface and delivery contracts.

readme.summary: Notification service abstraction: push, in-app, and browser notification channel interface and delivery contracts.
responsibilities: Define the typed notification send interface for push, in-app, and browser channels
Declare notification payload schemas and delivery channel contracts
Provide a channel registry for registering concrete delivery adapters per channel
Decouple feature packages from specific push notification providers
nonResponsibilities: Does not implement push delivery to FCM, APNs, or Web Push (owned by concrete adapters)
Does not own notification preference or opt-out state (owned by profile-configuration)
Does not manage notification history or read-state persistence
usage: Imported by feature packages to dispatch notifications across channels
Concrete channel adapters are registered at application startup via the channel registry
operationalNotes: Delivery is best-effort by default ? channels that require at-least-once must be backed by queue-runtime
Notification payloads must not contain PII beyond what is necessary for delivery
